items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0-Beta-8 Available
items.message:
v3.0.0-Beta-8 is now available in pre-releases.

Flash Mr. Fusion has been added. You can now download the latest Mr. Fusion image and balena CLI, select your SD card, and flash it directly from within MiSTer Companion.

This removes the need for external tools and simplifies the initial setup process.

You can download the latest pre-release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is currently not available.

To properly support macOS builds and testing, a Mac device is needed.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
